violations.detail: Bundler 2.x deprecated `bundle install --without` in favor of `ENV BUNDLE_WITHOUT=...` (or `bundle config set WITHOUT ...`). The flag still works but emits a deprecation notice on every CI run, and is slated for removal in Bundler 3.
violations.message: `bundle install` uses a flag deprecated in Bundler 2.x (--without, --deployment, --path)

suggestedFix.description: Replace `--without` with `ENV BUNDLE_WITHOUT="development"` (Bundler 2.x prefers the env-var form)

violations.detail: Bundler 2.x deprecated `bundle install --deployment` in favor of `ENV BUNDLE_DEPLOYMENT=...` (or `bundle config set DEPLOYMENT ...`). The flag still works but emits a deprecation notice on every CI run, and is slated for removal in Bundler 3.
violations.message: `bundle install` uses a flag deprecated in Bundler 2.x (--without, --deployment, --path)

suggestedFix.description: Replace `--deployment` with `ENV BUNDLE_DEPLOYMENT="1"` (Bundler 2.x prefers the env-var form)

violations.detail: Bundler 2.x deprecated `bundle install --path` in favor of `ENV BUNDLE_PATH=...` (or `bundle config set PATH ...`). The flag still works but emits a deprecation notice on every CI run, and is slated for removal in Bundler 3.
violations.message: `bundle install` uses a flag deprecated in Bundler 2.x (--without, --deployment, --path)

suggestedFix.description: Replace `--path` with `ENV BUNDLE_PATH="vendor/bundle"` (Bundler 2.x prefers the env-var form)
